expo.name: Ridhi – India's Social Universe
expo.description: Join Ridhi to live stream, chat in audio rooms, connect with people, send virtual gifts, and find your match—all in one powerful app.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Ridhi uses your location to show people and events near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Ridhi uses your location to show people and events near you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Ridhi needs camera access to let you post photos, videos, and go live.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Ridhi needs photo library access to let you share images and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Ridhi saves photos and videos to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Ridhi needs microphone access for video posts, voice messages, audio rooms, and live streams.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Ridhi uses your contacts to help you find friends who are already on Ridhi.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Ridhi uses Face ID to keep your account secure.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Ridhi uses data to personalise your feed, show relevant content, and improve your experience.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Ridhi accesses your calendar to let you schedule and add events.

web.name: Ridhi — India's #1 Social & Dating App
web.description: Ridhi — an India-based, globally first social universal app by Krilo Digitech Pvt Ltd. Connect, create, stream, date, and earn in your language.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Ridhi uses your location to show people and content near you.

plugins.photosPermission: Ridhi needs photo access to let you upload your profile picture, share posts, and create content.
plugins.cameraPermission: Ridhi needs camera access to let you take photos, record videos, and go live.

plugins.photosPermission: Ridhi needs photo library access to save your downloaded reels, stories, and posts.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Ridhi to save photos and videos to your gallery.
